label: Official 1444 (EU-leaning curated politics)
description: Second official curated-politics scenario for the 1444-11-11 start date. Europe-first elevated depth (HRE, Italian states, Iberia, France/Burgundy, British Isles, Poland-Lithuania, Balkans, Muscovy/Novgorod) with global major tags (Ming, Ottomans, Mamluks, India majors). Geometry remains the modern Natural Earth scaffold; ownership is a curated overlay (quality tier curated-politics). Not Paradox-grade completeness: residual modern ISO baselines and NAH/UNK tags remain outside priority theaters.

UNK.notes: Scaffold residual where no rule applies

WLS.notes: Under English crown; retained for cores

country_rules.notes: Armenian lands under Qara Qoyunlu sphere
Default Germany scaffold → Habsburg sphere; region rules assign electors/orders
Default Spain scaffold → Castile; region rules for Aragon/Navarre/Granada
Default UK scaffold → England; region rules assign Scotland/Wales/Ireland NI
Gibraltar still Muslim/contested scaffold → Castile claim
Default Greece → Ottoman; region rules for Morea/Byzantine remnants
Croatia in personal union / Hungarian crown
Default India → Delhi sphere; region rules for Vijayanagar south
Gaelic Ireland scaffold; England claims Pale
Default Iran → Qara Qoyunlu; region rules may refine
Default Italy → Naples; region rules assign north/center
Kingdom of Poland; Teutonic region rules on Baltic
Default Romania → Wallachia; Transylvania Hungarian via regions
Default Russia → Muscovy; Novgorod region rules north-west
Ottoman Anatolia; region rules for Byzantium remnant
Most of modern Ukraine under Lithuania; Crimea/south Ottoman/Crimean later

notes: M13 official era program. Demo counterpart is demo-1444 (scaffold-baseline pedagogy only). Prefer this scenario for EU-leaning packs and atlas choropleths. Modern nation outlines are not 1444 borders (M15+ period geometry). Golden floors enforce major-tag presence, not every frontier.
license_lineage: Natural Earth public domain (geographic scaffold only)
